word: G4874 - συναναμίγνυμι - synanamígnymi - soon-an-am-ig'-noo-mee - Have company with

sections.paragraph:
συναναμίγνυμι - sunanamignumi - soon-an-am-ig'-noo-mee

From G4862 and a compound of G303 and G3396; to mix up together, that is, (figuratively) associate with: - (have, keep) company (with).
